meta.phase-name: Pack/Report Binding and Canonical Model Selection

phase-summary.outcome: Space Explorer now displays loaded content-pack identity and loaded report binding with hash mismatch warnings; browser-generated reports persist pack binding metadata. Stat-control model selectors default to canonical model instances. CI/release workflows now generate `play-report-binding` artifacts linked to content-pack report hashes.

file.description: Added pack/report identity states and canonical-only model option path.
Writes `release-artifacts/play-report-binding-.json` from release content-pack report metadata.

tests.test: TypeScript typecheck passes with pack/report identity and canonical model option updates.
